description: Add configSchema with optional instanceUrl to the Confluence plugin so users with self-hosted Confluence Server/Data Center instances can configure their custom domain. The existing atlassian.net SaaS pattern is preserved.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/confluence && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Add configSchema with instanceUrl to Confluence plugin
userStories.description: Add a configSchema property with an optional instanceUrl field of type 'url' to the Confluence plugin class and package.json opentabs field. Keep existing SaaS urlPatterns.
acceptanceCriteria: ConfluencePlugin class has `override readonly configSchema: ConfigSchema` with an `instanceUrl` field of type 'url', required: false
package.json opentabs field has a `configSchema` object with the same `instanceUrl` definition
Existing `urlPatterns: ['*://*.atlassian.net/wiki/*']` is preserved in both src/index.ts and package.json
